Springhill Farm Choc Oat Slice 5 Pack 

  • Wholesome oat slices topped with a cheeky layer of chocolate

AdditionalAttributes.description:
The Elastoplast Kids waterproof wound plasters - ideal to cover and protect minor wounds when swimming or showering.

The Elastoplast Kids waterproof wound plasters are 100% waterproof and are ideal to cover and protect minor wounds when swimming or showering. With reliable adhesion, the plasters stay in place for longer while a non-stick wound pad protects and cushions the wound. The backing is flexible and breathable, which means it offers greater comfort and prevents water from getting trapped around the wound. Elastoplast Waterproof Kids 20 Strips plaster provides 100% waterproof, breathable protection to cover minor wounds. It is ideal for washing, showering, bathing and swimming. The non-stick wound pad protects and cushions the wound. Reliable adhesion ensures that the plaster stays in place with excellent skin tolerability. Directions: Clean wound and gently dry skin. Apply without stretching. The packaging of this product contains latex. The product is latex free.

100% WATERPROOF MATERIAL : The 100% waterproof yet breathable material is ideal for swimming and showering.

RELIABLE ADHESION : The reliable adhesion ensures that the plaster stays in place.

BLOCKS DIRT & BACTERIA: Elastoplast plasters block dirt and bacteria.

NON-STICK WOUNDPAD : The non-stick wound pad protects and cushions the wound.

We've got you covered

Experience the irresistible rustic tang of BBQ with every crunchy bite! Our BBQ Vege Chips are crafted to bring you that perfect balance of warm, smoky, and slightly sweet flavour — comforting, tasty, and impossible to stop at just one.

Perfect for sharing, these chips pair beautifully with creamy dips — try them with smooth, fresh hummus for a match made in snack heaven.

Why You’ll Love Them:
•	Plant-Based & Vegan-Friendly
•	Free From the Top 10 Allergens – including Gluten, Dairy, Eggs, Soy, Nuts & more
•	Cooked in High Oleic Sunflower Oil for that light, crispy crunch
•	No Artificial Colours, Preservatives, or GM Ingredients
•	Proudly Australian Made

Enjoy a snack that’s full of flavour, free from worry, and loved by the whole family.  Snack fearlessly.
